evals.name: static-marketing-site
evals.prompt: I need AWS infrastructure for a static marketing website (just HTML/CSS/JS, no backend). Single AWS account, region us-east-1, prod environment only, low traffic, public data (no PII), no auth needed. Output to ./iac (default). Please go through the full design + audit + promote flow end-to-end.

assertions.name: final_iac_dir_exists
assertions.description: The promoted iac/ directory exists at outputs/iac/.

assertions.name: adr_present
assertions.description: An ADR.md file exists at outputs/iac/ADR.md.

assertions.name: readme_present
assertions.description: A README.md file exists at outputs/iac/README.md.

assertions.name: tfvars_example_present
assertions.description: At least one .tfvars or .tfvars.example file exists.

assertions.name: adr_has_audit_findings
assertions.description: ADR.md 'Audit Findings' section is populated (not placeholder).

assertions.name: adr_has_cost_estimate
assertions.description: ADR.md 'Cost estimate' section has a dollar figure.

evals.name: account-baseline-2vpc-pii
evals.prompt: Design an AWS account baseline with networking: 2 VPCs (dev+staging shared, prod), region ap-southeast-1, PII data, IAM users + root only.
